headline: AI for Travel Planning: Itinerary Generation, Price Prediction, and Personalized Recommendations
description: AI plans your vacation -- from LLMs generating personalized itineraries to Hopper predicting the best time to book flights. Google, Expedia, and Booking.com have all launched conversational AI trip planners, transforming travel from search-heavy research to one-conversation booking.

citation.name: AI-Powered Travel Planning: LLM-Based Itinerary Generation, Price Prediction, and Personalization (2024-2025 Survey)
Machine Learning for Travel Demand Prediction: Flight Pricing, Hotel Occupancy, and Tourism Forecasting
